channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: An AI avatar tried to argue a case before a New York court. The judges weren't having it
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — It took only seconds for the judges on a New York appeals court to realize that the man addressing them from a video screen — a person about to present an argument in a lawsuit — not only had no law degree, but didn't exist at all.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nearly half of National Weather Service offices have 20% vacancy rates, and experts say it's a risk
item.description: Data obtained by The Associated Press shows that close to half of the local National Weather Service forecast offices have 20% vacancy rates as severe weather chugs across the nation’s heartland.
item.dc:creator: Seth Borenstein, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: How this former Disney Imagineer is shaping the next generation of defense technology
item.description: The way Bran Ferren sees it, the future of warfare depends as much on creativity as it does on raw firepower.
item.dc:creator: Jared Keller, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft's AI division head wants to create a lasting relationship between chatbots and their users
item.description: Fifty years after the founding of Microsoft, the CEO of its artificial intelligence division has a big task: develop a new product line as integral to daily life as the software giant’s past innovations.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: How to remotely reset your router: Steps for easy troubleshooting
item.description: You can reset your internet router remotely if you're not home when your power goes out. Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how this can be done.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AI vs. pro gambler's $1 million March Madness bet coming down to Duke and Houston
item.description: The $1 million March Madness wager between a pro gambler and an artificial-intelligence site will be decided by the winner of the Duke-Houston game in the Final Four.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Latest Nvidia RTX 5060 Ti GPU rumor suggests good news and bad when it comes to price
item.description: Hoping Nvidia might drop RTX 5060 Ti pricing compared to RTX 4060 Ti GPUs? You can forget that, but the good news is that a price hike isn’t rumored, either.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Canon EOS R7 Mark II rumored for 2025 with these significant upgrades – watch out Fujifilm
item.description: Rumors suggest that Canon will announced a replacement for the EOS R7 later this year, with a 40MP sensor among the upgrades.
item.dc:creator: christian.rowlands@me.com (Chris Rowlands), TechRadar

item.title: Increasingly dangerous scam targets kids through sextortion
item.description: The FBI issued a report that described sextortion as “a growing threat,” noting that the agency investigated roughly 1,000 cases a month for much of 2021 through early 2023.
item.dc:creator: Andre Mouchard, The Mercury News

item.title: How to troubleshoot and reset Windows Update
item.description: Like it or not, those who use Windows Update to obtain and install updates, patches, and fixes will occasionally encounter issues. Sometimes, a specific update may not download. At other times, an update may fail to install. Every now and then, Windows Update (a.k.a.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: High-tech canopy provides off-grid power and water
item.description: The EO Canopy is a self-sustaining, solar-powered camping platform designed to provide all the comforts of home while completely off the grid.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 9 Principles to Improve Your IT Supplier Relationship Management
item.description: Improve your IT supplier relationship management skills by focusing on specific principles and practices, creating a tiered management structure, separating management roles, enabling peer-to-peer communications, establishing a cadence of communications, developing a relationship management program, maintaining formal annual relationship health monitoring, developing a process to resolve issues, ensuring resource continuity, and incorporating an onboarding plan.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: A look back at Microsoft’s IPO
item.description: On April 4, 2000, to celebrate Microsoft’s 25th anniversary, Network World’s Paul McNamara put together the post you’ll see below. The story hasn’t changed.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Top 15 Microsoft Azure certifications to expedite your IT career
item.description: With companies increasingly moving their data to cloud, there’s an extensive need for more professionals with sound understanding and expertise of cloud technology. Microsoft’s cloud offering, Azure, ranks among the top in the industry.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Blissfully fast and simple JavaScript frameworks
item.description: Simple and fast. That’s all we want from our software tools. And meeting the requirements, of course. You can’t go without that. Also, we’d like them to be pleasant to use, with a good developer experience. It would be really great to have a friendly community.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft founder Bill Gates reflects upon a 50-year-old computer code that reshaped technology
item.description: Even as he grows older, Microsoft founder Bill Gates still fondly remembers the catalytic computer code he wrote 50 years ago that opened up a new frontier in technology.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: New Relic simplifies Kubernetes performance monitoring
item.description: New Relic this week announced a new capability in its Intelligent Observability Platform that the company says will enable engineering teams to deploy an eBPF-powered agent to automatically discover and monitor all applications running on Kubernetes clusters.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: A behind-the-scenes look at Nintendo Switch 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Nintendo's Switch 2 is bigger and better than its predecessor of eight years past as the video game developer pushes to bring its brand into “a new era" where social experiences are at the forefront.
item.dc:creator: RYAN KRYSKA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Accelerate cloud infrastructure initiatives with Lucid Software
item.description: Cloud and development operations (devops) teams are under constant pressure to do more, faster. They have outdated systems to update and manage, new systems to build, and requests from business units who need their support. It’s a velocity problem, and IT departments often struggle to keep pace.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: United receives FAA certification on Starlink-equipped aircraft
item.description: United has received FAA approval for a Starlink-equipped plane. The first commercial flight is set for May.
item.dc:creator: Diana Falzone, The Hill

item.title: Humanoid robot stuns with perfect side-flip acrobatics
item.description: Unitree, a Chinese robotics company that developed a backflipping robot, has now introduced a humanoid robot capable of doing a side flip.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Meta is fined by Turkey after refusing to restrict content on Facebook and Instagram
item.description: Meta said it has been hit with a hefty fine for resisting Turkish government demands to limit content on Facebook and Instagram.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Google’s new AI tech may know when your house will burn down
item.description: FireSat is a satellite project designed to detect and track wildfires early, aiming to detect a fire that's the size of a classroom within 20 minutes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump to hold a meeting on possible investors to buy TikTok with possible ban at stake
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — President Donald Trump will hold a Wednesday meeting with aides about possible investors who could buy a stake in TikTok, a deal that could potentially stop the social media site from being banned in the United States.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Detroit production of Mozart opera turns its female characters into automatons
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Audiences at the Detroit Opera House expecting their performance of “Cosi fan tutte" to begin with the overture may be surprised to hear instead a product launch from a tech company CEO.
item.dc:creator: MIKE SILVERMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dow wants to power its Texas manufacturing complex with new nuclear reactors instead of natural gas
item.description: Dow, a major producer of chemicals and plastics, wants to use next-generation nuclear reactors for clean power and steam at a Texas manufacturing complex instead of natural gas. Dow's subsidiary, Long Mott Energy, applied Monday to the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission for a construction permit.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER McDERMOTT, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Jack Black, Jason Momoa enter the Minecraft universe as the video game phenom hits the big screen
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — When Jack Black got the call to star in the “Minecraft” movie, the perks were plenty. He got to work alongside Jason Momoa, reunite with “Nacho Libre” director Jared Hess and engulf himself into a beloved gaming universe.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Weekend news dump: GSA, SBA, IRS initiate new workforce cuts
item.description: A roundup of news from late Friday afternoon that you may have missed about SBA, GSA reopening the Deferred Resignation Program. The post Weekend news dump: GSA, SBA, IRS initiate new workforce cuts first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Navy’s Justin Fanelli, Brandon Wehler and Matthew Rambo on unified endpoints
item.description: A new Navy initiative seeks best-of-breed solutions for more centralized endpoint management, the service technology experts share. The post DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Navy’s Justin Fanelli, Brandon Wehler and Matthew Rambo on unified endpoints first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jared Serbu, Federal News Network

item.title: China's telecoms giant Huawei Technologies says its profit fell 28% while revenue surged in 2024
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Chinese telecoms gear giant Huawei said Monday its net profit fell 28% in 2024 while its revenue surged, as the company invested heavily in advanced technologies.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: AI enables paralyzed man to control robotic arm with brain signals
item.description: The combination of artificial intelligence and neuroscience allows a paralyzed man to manipulate a robotic arm by using his brain to imagine movements.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
